title.en: China-to-Mauritius Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入毛里求斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入模里西斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Mauritius MSB conformity expectations, URA and CEB distributed-generation project approval, SSDG/MSDG rooftop PV connection requirements, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 61000 and IEC 62920 EMC evidence, 230/400 V 50 Hz settings, and coastal cyclone/salt-mist derating — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与毛里求斯MSB合格评定预期、URA和CEB分布式发电项目审批、SSDG/MSDG屋顶光伏接入要求、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727电网接口证据、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC证据、230/400 V 50 Hz参数以及沿海气旋和盐雾降额——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與模里西斯MSB合格評定預期、URA和CEB分散式發電項目審批、SSDG/MSDG屋頂光伏接入要求、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727電網介面證據、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC證據、230/400 V 50 Hz參數以及沿海氣旋和鹽霧降額——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Mauritius Standards Bureau conformity determination, Utility Regulatory Authority approval, Central Electricity Board connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current MSB standards adoption, URA licensing or approval rules, CEB SSDG/MSDG programme requirements, grid-code conditions, cyclone and salt-mist design assumptions, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、毛里求斯标准局合格评定裁定、公用事业监管局批准、中央电力局接入批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行MSB标准采纳、URA许可或审批规则、CEB SSDG/MSDG计划要求、电网规范条件、气旋和盐雾设计假设及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、模里西斯標準局合格評定裁定、公用事業監管局批准、中央電力局接入批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行MSB標準採納、URA許可或審批規則、CEB SSDG/MSDG計畫要求、電網規範條件、氣旋和鹽霧設計假設及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Mauritius, the main practical gaps are: (1) MSB conformity and IEC-aligned evidence expectations in a BS/IEC-influenced standards system; (2) URA and CEB approval for SSDG/MSDG distributed-generation projects before connection; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (4) IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence for a 230/400 V, 50 Hz network; (5) IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (6) coastal cyclone and salt-mist derating documentation. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are useful engineering baselines but are not automatically accepted for Mauritius MSB/URA/CEB gates without supplementary IEC evidence and local project approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口毛里求斯时，主要实际差距包括：（1）在受BS/IEC影响的标准体系下满足MSB合格评定和IEC对齐证据预期；（2）SSDG/MSDG分布式发电项目并网前取得URA和CEB审批；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（4）适用于230/400 V、50 Hz电网的IEC 62116和IEC 61727电网接口证据；（5）IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据；（6）沿海气旋和盐雾降额文件。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作为工程基准，但在缺少补充IEC证据和当地项目审批时，不会自动被毛里求斯MSB/URA/CEB门槛接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口模里西斯時，主要實際差距包括：（1）在受BS/IEC影響的標準體系下滿足MSB合格評定和IEC對齊證據預期；（2）SSDG/MSDG分散式發電項目併網前取得URA和CEB審批；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（4）適用於230/400 V、50 Hz電網的IEC 62116和IEC 61727電網介面證據；（5）IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據；（6）沿海氣旋和鹽霧降額文件。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作為工程基準，但在缺少補充IEC證據和當地項目審批時，不會自動被模里西斯MSB/URA/CEB門檻接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
